prompt: A close-up candid portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="young woman"} indoors against a muted beige wall, shot in a 1990s disposable camera snapshot style. She has pale skin, a soft understated smirk, and loose {argument name="hair color" default="black"} hair with natural volume, slightly messy waves, and face-framing strands spreading around her shoulders. She wears a {argument name="top color" default="faded mauve"} oversized sweatshirt with a relaxed fit and softly gathered sleeves. The framing is chest-up and slightly off-center at eye level, with her body angled casually and one arm subtly extending forward as if taking the photo herself. Use direct on-camera flash for flat shadows, a dim ambient room, visible but subtle film grain, soft edge falloff, and a nostalgic casual vibe. The wall behind her is decorated with exactly 8 taped paper items: 4 instant photos, 2 concert flyers, 1 handwritten note, and 1 small dark photo print. One flyer references {argument name="band name" default="SONIC YOUTH"}, another references {argument name="second band name" default="NIRVANA"}. The overall image should feel intimate, imperfect, slightly grainy, and authentically analog.
translatedPrompt: 一张室内近景抓拍人像，{argument name="subject" default="年轻女性"} 背靠柔和的米色墙壁，采用 1990 年代一次性相机快照风格拍摄。她皮肤白皙，带着淡淡的、内敛的微笑，留着蓬松的 {argument name="hair color" default="黑色"} 卷发，发丝自然凌乱，几缕发丝垂落在肩头。她穿着一件 {argument name="top color" default="褪色紫红色"} 的宽松卫衣，版型休闲，袖口微微收拢。构图为胸部以上，视线平齐且略微偏离中心，身体姿态随性，一只手臂微微向前伸展，仿佛是她自己在自拍。使用直射机顶闪光灯营造平坦的阴影，环境光线昏暗，带有可见但细腻的胶片颗粒感，边缘柔和，充满怀旧随性的氛围。她身后的墙上贴着 8 件纸质物品：4 张拍立得照片、2 张演唱会传单、1 张手写便条和 1 张小型深色照片打印件。其中一张传单提到 {argument name="band name" default="SONIC YOUTH"}，另一张提到 {argument name="second band name" default="NIRVANA"}。整体画面应呈现出亲密、不完美、略带颗粒感且真实的模拟胶片质感。

breakdown.creativeCore: 一次性相机卧室人像：此提示词可生成带有怀旧闪光灯效果的特写人像，呈现模拟胶片质感，非常适合编辑风格的情绪图、独立音乐视觉素材或随性的复古生活方式人像。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: close-up]。

Visual style:
[媒介/渲染方式/审美方向/色彩系统]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: film grain, camera]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
